response.justification: This senior engineer possesses exceptional technical credentials that comprehensively exceed the junior/mid-level requirements, with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and software architecture. However, severe overqualification creates substantial retention risk—the role will likely prove unchallenging, resulting in early departure. Combined with a recent career gap and a pattern of 1-2 year tenures, this represents a poor mutual fit despite the candidate's technical excellence.
strengths: Extensive full-stack expertise directly covering all required technologies: TypeScript, Node.js/REST APIs, React, SQL databases, and clean architecture practices
15+ years of senior/staff-level experience across frontend, backend, and infrastructure with demonstrated ability to handle complex, high-performance systems
Recent AI/infrastructure work at re:cinq shows current relevance and engagement with modern development practices and emerging technologies
concerns: Severely overqualified for a junior-level position; staff-engineer background creates high risk of rapid disengagement and turnover within 6-12 months
Recent career gap (Oct 2025-present, 7 months) and pattern of 1-2 year tenures across previous roles raise questions about long-term commitment and stability
No explicit Nest.js framework experience mentioned despite it being a key stack technology; PostgreSQL not specifically referenced (though general SQL competence is clear)

key_factors.factor: Severity of overqualification vs. role seniority level
Technical mastery of required stack and skills
Employment history stability and tenure pattern
